findings.message: 机械替换导致 TODO 注释语义错误。原始注释 `# TODO to allow tolerance`（其中 `allow` 后接名词 `tolerance`，并非不定式）被错误地替换为 `# TODO to allow one tolerance`，变得无意义。应还原为 `# TODO to allow tolerance` 或改为 `# TODO allow tolerance`。 (also flagged by ai_smell)
findings.suggestion: 将无意义的 `allow one tolerance` 改回有意义的 `allow tolerance`。原意是"允许（使用）容差"而非"允许一个人去容差"。
findings.suggestion_code: if (outlineLeftAll[-1] - obj.OutlineLeft[0]).Length < 0.01: # To avoid 2 points overlapping fail creating LineSegment # TODO to allow tolerance Part.LineSegment / edge.toShape() allow?
findings.existing_code: if (outlineLeftAll[-1] - obj.OutlineLeft[0]).Length < 0.01: # To avoid 2 points overlapping fail creating LineSegment # TODO to allow one tolerance Part.LineSegment / edge.toShape() allow?
findings.evidence: 第 1271 行注释 `# TODO to allow one tolerance` 明显是机械替换（如 `a tolerance` → `one tolerance`）的误伤结果，原意为"允许容差"，插入 `one` 后语义不通。应还原为 `# TODO to allow tolerance` 或 `# TODO allow tolerance`。

findings.message: 注释语法修复不完整：原始 "allows to behave every DocumentObject" 的真正含义是"允许每个 DocumentObject 表现为 Python feature"，而非"允许某人去表现每个 DocumentObject"。替换为 "allows one to behave" 后语义仍然不通。应改为 "allows every DocumentObject derived class to behave as a Python feature"。
findings.suggestion: 将 "allows one to behave every DocumentObject" 改为 "allows every DocumentObject derived class to behave as a Python feature"。
findings.suggestion_code:
* Generic Python feature class which allows every DocumentObject
 * derived class to behave as Python feature -- simply by subclassing.
findings.existing_code:
* Generic Python feature class which allows one to behave every DocumentObject
 * derived class as Python feature -- simply by subclassing.
findings.evidence: 当前注释 "allows one to behave every DocumentObject derived class as Python feature" 语法不通："behave" 是不及物动词，不能接宾语 "every DocumentObject"。原意应为"允许每个 DocumentObject 派生类表现为 Python feature"，建议改为 "allows every DocumentObject derived class to behave as a Python feature" 语义清晰正确。
